All-battle-sprites dump — every tile that appears in OAM gets a PPU dump
[1] mode $FF -> $00
[58] mode $00 -> $08
[91] Name entry screen
[91] mode $08 -> $A8
[717] mode $A8 -> $00
[717] Past name entry — pressing A into battle
[759] mode $00 -> $70
[824] mode $70 -> $6F
[827] mode $6F -> $70
[892] mode $70 -> $6F
[893] mode $6F -> $70
[1028] mode $70 -> $6F
[1036] mode $6F -> $70

[1451] mode $70 -> $6F
[1459] mode $6F -> $70
[1467] mode $70 -> $6F
[1475] mode $6F -> $70
[1571] mode $70 -> $01
[1572] mode $01 -> $09
[1832] mode $09 -> $05
[1957] mode $05 -> $20
